name: python3-launchpadlib
title: python3-launchpadlib
description:
Launchpad web services client library (Python 3)
A free Python library for scripting Launchpad through its web services
interface.
.
It currently provides access to the following parts of Launchpad:
* People and Teams
* Team memberships
* Bugs and bugtasks
.
The Launchpad API is currently in beta, and may well change in ways
incompatible with this library.
.
This package is for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-launchpadlib because Launchpad web services client library (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-launchpadlib as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-launchpadlib with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-launchpadlib --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
